fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Databricks server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Warehouse
fields.description: The SQL warehouse to use (provide the ID)

fields.label: Query
fields.description: SQL query to execute

fields.label: Query Parameters
fields.description: Named parameters for the query. Reference them in your SQL as :name, e.g. WHERE ID = :user_id. (JSON object; supported keys: parameters, parameters.name, parameters.value, parameters.type)

endpoints.label: Query Endpoint Model Serving

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Databricks server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Endpoint
fields.description: The model serving endpoint to query. The input format will be automatically detected from the endpoint schema. The node will fetch the endpoint's OpenAPI schema to determine the correct invocation URL. (provide the ID)

fields.label: Request Body
fields.placeholder: Request body will be validated against the endpoint schema
fields.description: Request body in JSON format. The node automatically detects the expected format from the endpoint's OpenAPI schema and validates your input at runtime.

endpoints.description: Query a serving endpoint. The input format is automatically detected from the endpoint schema.

fields.label: Index Name
fields.description: Name of the vector search index

fields.label: Endpoint Name
fields.description: Name of the vector search endpoint

fields.label: Primary Key
fields.description: Primary key column of the index

fields.label: Index Type
fields.description: Type of vector search index to create

fields.label: Delta Sync Index Spec
fields.description: Specification for the Delta Sync index

fields.label: Direct Access Index Spec
fields.description: Specification for the Direct Access index

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Databricks server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Index Name
fields.description: Name of the vector search index

fields.label: Endpoint Name

endpoints.label: Query Index Vector Search

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Databricks server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Index Name
fields.description: Name of the vector search index

fields.label: Query Type
fields.description: Type of query to perform

fields.label: Query Text
fields.description: Text to search for (will be automatically converted to embeddings)

fields.label: Query Vector
fields.description: Vector embeddings to search for similar vectors (array of numbers)

fields.label: Search Mode
fields.description: Search algorithm to use

fields.label: Columns to Return
fields.description: Comma-separated list of column names to return in results (e.g., "content,URL,title")

fields.label: Number of Results
fields.description: Maximum number of results to return

fields.label: Enable Reranking
fields.description: Whether to rerank results using a reranker model for improved relevance

fields.label: Reranker Model
fields.description: Name of the reranker model to use

fields.label: Columns to Rerank
fields.description: Comma-separated list of columns to use for reranking (e.g., "content,title")

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: filterExpression, scoreThreshold)

endpoints.description: Query a vector search index with text or vectors
